supply_chain.dependencies: The Company relies on Amazon Web Services for cloud-based services and Google for workspace and enterprise services. The Company depends on third-party suppliers for paper deliveries and third-party printing and distribution partners. Single or limited number of suppliers for certain products, services, data and information.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions including labor shortages, higher transportation costs, financial pressures on suppliers, industry consolidation, closure or conversion of newsprint mills, natural disasters, extreme weather, pandemics, tariffs or trade policy changes. Issues affecting suppliers including cybersecurity incidents, data center outages, insufficient capacity. Termination of key supplier agreements with short notice. Concentration risk with limited suppliers for critical services.

regulatory_risks: EU Benchmarks Regulation (EU BMR) compliance for OPIS price assessments
Data privacy regulations including GDPR (EU), UK GDPR, California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), state data privacy laws
Children's Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA)
California Age Appropriate Design Code (CAADC)
New York Child Data Protection Act
U.S. Department of Justice data regulations on sensitive personal data transfers to countries of concern
UK Data (Use and Access) Act 2025
Australia Privacy Act 1988 and Australian Privacy Principles
UK Press Recognition Panel and IPSO regulation
UK Digital Markets, Competition and Consumers Act 2024 restricting foreign ownership of UK newspapers
UK Communications Act 2003 and Broadcasting Code for radio stations
Ofcom regulation for radio broadcasting and on-demand services
Antitrust and competition law compliance
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and UK Bribery Act
Trade restrictions and economic sanctions
AI regulation (evolving and unsettled)
ESG reporting requirements and conflicting ESG legislation
Tax law changes including OECD Pillar 2 global minimum tax
Digital services taxes in various jurisdictions
Intellectual property laws and enforcement challenges with generative AI
EU Deforestation Regulation

sanction_risks: Compliance with economic sanctions and trade restrictions
U.S. sanctions on countries of concern affecting data transfers
Restrictions on access to sensitive personal data and U.S. government data by countries of concern
